seoTitle: Margaret River vs Marlow Lagoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Margaret River and Marlow Lagoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Margaret River vs Marlow Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Margaret River and Marlow Lagoon.
heading: Margaret River vs Marlow Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Margaret River, Northern Territory and Marlow Lagoon, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marlow Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Margaret River (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Margaret River or Marlow Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Margaret River has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Marlow Lagoon scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Margaret River scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Marlow Lagoon scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Margaret River or Marlow Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marlow Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
